author: praasz

failed_jobs.name: OpenVINO JS API / OpenVINO JS API

root_cause: The electron@39.8.5 postinstall script (node install.js) failed to download the Electron binary from its CDN with an HTTP 504 Gateway Timeout. This caused the demo-electron-app-project npm install to fail, resulting in 'electron: not found' when the E2E test tried to run npm start.
signature: HTTPError: Response code 504 Gateway Time-out|OpenVINO JS API / OpenVINO JS API|Network
note: Re-investigation of same run - previous investigation at 2026-06-08T11:19:16Z
